creator: thj@FreeBSD.org
text:
The No buffer space error indicates the socket buffer is full, this is expected behaviour. I found an OpenVPN release note that mentions quiting this error in linux:
https://github.com/OpenVPN/openvpn/blob/4376805d8fd2a5d4a3a7c5e4f60948a3ef76ff3b/ChangeLog#L3652

I would suggest opening a bug with OpenVPN if this continues to be an issue for you.
